layoutRegions.name: approval-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Track purge requests, policy exceptions, legal holds, and sealed authorization packets.

layoutRegions.name: request-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare archive purge requests by owner, exception, approval state, and rollback readiness.

layoutRegions.name: authorization-workspace
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect retention exceptions, legal hold overrides, delegated approvals, retry hash preservation, checksum proof retention, and rollback-safe authorization packets.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Compact purge approval counter with semantic status tone.

components.name: RequestCard
components.purpose: Archive purge request card showing exception, approval, status, and authorization progress.
interactions: status chip maps to approval state

components.name: AuthorizationRow
components.purpose: Rollback-safe purge authorization row with command and packet proof details.
interactions: authorization text remains readable at narrow widths
row layout does not shift when state changes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button and status row has a visible focus or stable hover-safe presentation.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
